name: Russian Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground walnuts, 1 cup sugar, and 2 teaspoons cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. Reserve 3/4 cup for topping. In another bowl, cut butter into flour; add egg yolks, milk, and yeast dissolved in warm water, blending well.
4. Line a jelly roll pan with foil.
5. Roll out one part of the dough and line the pan bottom.
6. Spread the nut mixture (less 3/4 cup) over the dough.
7. Roll and spread the second layer of dough.
8. Spread apricot filling over the dough.
9. Roll and spread the top layer of dough.
10. Bake at 350 degrees in the oven for 35 minutes.
11. Beat egg whites, adding sugar until stiff.
12. Immediately spread over the torte while still warm.
13. Sprinkle with the reserved 3/4 cup sugar/nut mixture.
14. Bake additional 10 minutes.
15. Cut into squares.
